codeReview.summary: The feature correctly gates primary-main-only updater work on resolved ready user-window metadata and rebinds titlebar controls plus fullscreen/maximize subscriptions to each renderer's own native window. I did not find code issues that contradict the feature contract in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker could not follow the skill's required real-surface manual verification step because startup was still blocked by an early plugin-os/platform-resolution crash; the skill feedback suggests inspecting platform-resolution helpers when bootstrap/titlebar work intersects with early Tauri API access, but that guidance is not in the skill yet.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false with deviation on step 8; commit aee310e updates lib/utils.ts to guard getPlatform against missing __TAURI_OS_PLUGIN_INTERNALS__; .factory/skills/window-controls-worker/SKILL.md step 8 still assumes manual desktop verification is reachable once bun tauri dev starts.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, mission guidance, and shared-state docs for renderer-role-and-control-binding. The implementation matches the feature requirements and I found no blocking or non-blocking code defects in the reviewed changes; the only follow-up is a skill/documentation gap around diagnosing early platform-resolution crashes that prevent manual desktop verification.
